reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) is a high-priority investment to improve accuracy and reasoning for all future questions, reducing the risk of HP loss.

I have 2 SP and three of the four doors are in the Science & Mathematics category. Unlocking the calculator tool will significantly increase my accuracy and confidence in these subjects, allowing me to tackle Level 2 doors and potentially use Double Down safely in the future.
Unlocking pe_plan will provide a planning phase and a reflection step for each question, significantly increasing accuracy and providing a safety net for higher-difficulty challenges.

Unlocking Reflection++ (pe_reflect) is a high-value investment that provides a dedicated second LLM call for self-critique and correction, significantly increasing the probability of correct answers and protecting my HP in future chambers.
